# ClusterCheck

## Shared Step Fields

## `CheckCluster`

Poll and verify Kubernetes cluster health on the local node.

- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/cluster-check.schema.json`

### When To Use

Use this for typed bootstrap and upgrade verification instead of ad-hoc kubectl shell loops.

### Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-checkcluster
kind: CheckCluster
spec: {}
```
